description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Ships OpenWork 0.11.212 across the desktop app, server, orchestrator, and router packages.
- Refreshes the lockfile and release metadata for the latest patch cut.
Fixes & polish
- Aligns all published package and desktop bundle versions to 0.11.212.
Packaging / ops
- Updates Cargo and pnpm lockfiles for the 0.11.212 release.
Compare:
https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.11.211...v0.11.212
